UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROSBY, HEAFEY, ROACH & MAY, A PROFESSIONAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOTHER'S WORK, INC. $43,138.66 PRINCIPAL, $5,397.17 INTEREST, $334.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,869.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROSBY, HEAFEY, ROACH & MAY, A PROFESSIONAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MOTHER'S WORK, INC.
